holidays_closed: New Year's Eve (half day, close at noon)

exclusion_criteria: Vomiting or diarrhea within the last 24 hours
sick_policy.return_policy: Children must be symptom-free for 24 hours without medication before returning.
sick_policy.notification: Parents will be called immediately if symptoms develop during the day. Pickup is required within 1 hour of notification.

lunch_menu.monday: Grilled cheese, tomato soup, apple slices, milk
lunch_menu.tuesday: Chicken nuggets, steamed broccoli, rice, juice
lunch_menu.wednesday: Turkey & cheese wraps, carrot sticks, yogurt, water
lunch_menu.thursday: Mac & cheese, green beans, peaches, milk
lunch_menu.friday: Pizza bagels, side salad, graham crackers, juice

tour_scheduling.available_times: Tuesday and Thursday, 10:00 AM or 2:00 PM
tour_scheduling.how_to_book: Call us at (555) 123-4567 or email tours@sunshineelc.com
tour_scheduling.what_to_bring: Photo ID, any questions you have about our programs

pickup_dropoff_rules.authorized_persons: Only persons listed on the pickup authorization form may pick up your child. Photo ID is required.
pickup_dropoff_rules.procedure: All parents must sign in/out at the front desk. Children will only be released to authorized adults.

additional_policies.potty_training: We work with families on potty training for toddlers. Please send extra clothes.
additional_policies.nap_time: 12:30 PM – 2:30 PM for all rooms. Infants nap on their own schedule.
additional_policies.outdoor_play: Weather permitting, children have outdoor play twice daily. Please apply sunscreen before drop-off in summer.
additional_policies.birthdays: We love celebrating! Store-bought treats only, and please notify us 3 days in advance.
additional_policies.communication: Daily reports are sent via the Sunshine app. Weekly newsletters go out every Friday.
